Package io.vanslog.spring.data.meilisearch.core.mapping

Class SimpleMeilisearchPersistentProperty

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.mapping.model.AbstractPersistentProperty<P>
org.springframework.data.mapping.model.AnnotationBasedPersistentProperty<MeilisearchPersistentProperty>
io.vanslog.spring.data.meilisearch.core.mapping.SimpleMeilisearchPersistentProperty
All Implemented Interfaces:
MeilisearchPersistentProperty, PersistentProperty<MeilisearchPersistentProperty>
public class SimpleMeilisearchPersistentProperty extends AnnotationBasedPersistentProperty<MeilisearchPersistentProperty> implements MeilisearchPersistentProperty
Meilisearch specific PersistentEntity implementation holding.
Author:
Junghoon Ban
